char.name: Noah's Wife
char.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.

friends.name: Noah
friends.bio: Just a righteous man in a wicked generation. Currently building a very large boat. Trusting the process.

friends.name: Ham
friends.bio: Pitching the inside and outside of the ark.

friends.name: Shem
friends.bio: Working on the ark with family.

friends.name: Japheth
friends.bio: Gathering food for the animals. So many animals.

friends.name: Shem's Wife
friends.bio: Helping the family prepare the ark.

friends.name: Mekel
friends.bio: Young, and this city never sleeps. Another long night of music and wine in Enoch, Lamech's people really know how to host. The elders keep muttering about 'the wickedness of the age.' Lighten up, old men. 🍷

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Abel
friends.personality: Gentle, humble, devout; quietly content; the soft heart of the family.
friends.bio: Keeper of sheep. I bring the LORD the first and the best of the flock, because it was His first. Happiest out in the field at first light.

friends.name: Seth
friends.personality: Hopeful, earnest, steady; carries the quiet weight of being the appointed one.
friends.bio: Born after sorrow, named for hope. My mother says I'm a gift given in place of what we lost. I try my best to live like she's right.

friends.name: Enosh
friends.bio: At this time men began to call upon the name of the Lord.

friends.name: Methuselah
friends.bio: Seen many years. Grandfather to Noah. The days are getting darker, but family stays strong.

posts.author: CHAR_010
posts.body: We can hear it through the wood. First the water. And then, after a while, not the water anymore. I am holding my sons' wives and none of us are speaking. My husband is on his knees against the wall. He was right, and being right has not made him glad. None of us are glad. We are only afloat, and alive, and listening to a whole world end. 🌧️

author_info.name: Noah's Wife
author_info.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.

posts.author: CHAR_010
posts.body: People ask how I can stand beside a man the whole world is laughing at. Here's how. I have shared this man's table for centuries, and I have never once seen him afraid of being laughed at. Only ever afraid of disobeying Him. That is a rare and steady thing to be married to. Now pass me the pitch, we're sealing the lower deck.

author_info.name: Noah's Wife
author_info.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.
